meta.title: Terms and Conditions | Go2Fix.ro
meta.description: Terms and conditions for using the Go2Fix.ro platform.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.intro: Please read these Terms and Conditions carefully before using the Go2Fix.ro platform. By accessing or using our services, you agree to these terms.

s1.title: 1. Definitions
s1.intro: In this document, the terms below have the following meanings:
s1.platformDef: the go2fix.ro website and associated applications, operated by Go2Fix SRL
s1.userDef: any natural or legal person who accesses or uses the Platform
s1.clientDef: the user who orders cleaning services through the Platform
s1.partnerDef: the verified and approved cleaning company that provides services through the Platform
s1.serviceDef: the cleaning service booked and paid for through the Platform
s1.accountDef: the account created by the User to access the Platform's features

s2.title: 2. Use of the platform
s2.p1: Go2Fix.ro is an intermediary platform that facilitates the connection between Clients and partner cleaning companies. The Platform is not the direct provider of cleaning services.
s2.p2: Use of the Platform is permitted to persons aged at least 18 years. By creating an account, you confirm that you have full legal capacity.
s2.p3: Bookings made through the Platform constitute direct contracts between the Client and the Partner company. Go2Fix SRL acts exclusively as an intermediary and is not a party to the cleaning services contract.

s3.title: 3. User obligations
s3.o1: Provide accurate and complete information when registering and placing orders;
s3.o2: Not use the Platform for illegal purposes or contrary to public order;
s3.o3: Not disrupt the normal operation of the Platform or other users;
s3.o4: Not reproduce, distribute or modify Platform content without Go2Fix SRL's written consent;
s3.o5: Maintain the confidentiality of account access credentials;
s3.o6: Pay for booked services at the displayed prices;
s3.o7: Allow the cleaning team access to the address specified at the scheduled date.

s4.title: 4. Prices and payments
s4.p1: All prices displayed on the Platform include VAT where applicable and are expressed in Romanian lei (RON). The final service price is calculated automatically based on the area, number of rooms and selected additional services.
s4.p2: Payment is made electronically, by bank card, through the Stripe payment processor. Go2Fix SRL does not store your card data.
s4.p3: Go2Fix SRL charges an intermediary commission from the value of each transaction. The commission is included in the final price displayed to the Client.

s5.title: 5. Cancellation, rescheduling and refunds
s5.p1: The Client may cancel a booking at any time before the scheduled time, subject to the following refund conditions: (1) Free cancellation — more than 24 hours in advance: full refund (100%), funds returned to card within 3-5 business days; (2) Late cancellation — between 2 and 24 hours in advance: a 30% administration fee is retained, and the client receives 70% back; (3) Last-minute cancellation or no-show — less than 2 hours before, or if the team cannot access the location after waiting at least 20 minutes: no refund is issued, as the time slot was fully reserved.
s5.p2: If the service provider cannot arrive due to their own fault (force majeure, vehicle breakdown, medical emergency), the client will be notified immediately and will receive a full refund (100%) or the option to reschedule with a 10% discount for the inconvenience.
s5.p3: The Client may reschedule a booking free of charge at least 24 hours before the scheduled time. Rescheduling requests made less than 24 hours in advance may be treated as a late cancellation (per point 2 above) and a new booking.
s5.p4: If the service was not provided as contracted, the Client may request a partial or full refund through the Platform within 48 hours of the scheduled service completion. Refund requests are reviewed individually by the Go2Fix team.

s6.title: 6. Liability
s6.p1: Go2Fix SRL is not liable for direct or indirect damages caused by Partner companies' failure to fulfil their contractual obligations. Our liability as intermediary is limited to the value of the intermediary commission charged for that transaction.
s6.p2: Partner companies are required to maintain active professional civil liability insurance throughout the entire collaboration with Go2Fix. Insurance documents are verified during each company's onboarding and periodically thereafter.

s7.title: 7. Changes to the terms
s7.p1: Go2Fix SRL reserves the right to modify these Terms and Conditions at any time. Changes take effect on the date of publication on the Platform. Continued use of the Platform after publication of changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms. We recommend checking this page periodically.

s8.title: 8. Contact
s8.p1: For any questions regarding these Terms and Conditions, you can contact us at contact@go2fix.ro or at Go2Fix SRL's registered office, Bucharest, Romania.

meta.title: GDPR Privacy Notice | Go2Fix.ro
meta.description: GDPR information notice on personal data processing on the Go2Fix.ro platform, pursuant to Regulation (EU) 2016/679.

gdpr.title: GDPR Privacy Notice
gdpr.intro: This notice describes in detail what personal data we collect, from whom, for what purpose, on what legal basis, and for how long — for each category of user of the Go2Fix.ro platform. Please read it carefully before using our services.

s1.title: 1. Data Controller
s1.p1: The data controller is Go2Fix SRL, headquartered in Bucharest, Romania, registered at the Trade Registry. Our Data Protection Officer (DPO) can be reached at: contact@go2fix.ro. Any request regarding your data will receive a response within 30 calendar days.

s2.title: 2. Data Collected by User Category
s2.intro: We collect only the data necessary for the platform to function, depending on each user's role:
clientItems: Service address (street, number, floor, apartment, city, county, postal code)
GPS coordinates of the address (for route optimization)
Booking history (service type, area, rooms, bathrooms, pets, special instructions)
B2B billing data: company name, tax ID (CUI), fiscal address, IBAN (optional)
Last 4 digits and card type (stored by Stripe, not directly by us)
Stripe Customer ID (reference token for payments)
Firebase FCM push token for notifications (optional)
IP address and browser information at authentication
companyItems: Uploaded documents: Constatator Certificate, RCA Insurance, CUI Document
ANAF verification data: official name, address, founding date, VAT status
Stripe Connect Account ID (for receiving payments)
IP address and browser information of the administrator at authentication
workerItems: Uploaded documents: Criminal Record Certificate, Employment Contract
Home GPS coordinates (latitude/longitude, for route optimization)
Personality test results (28 questions, 7 psychometric facets)
Automatically generated analysis summary based on the test
Reviews and ratings received from clients
Firebase FCM push token for notifications (optional)

s3.title: 3. Legal Bases for Processing
s3.intro: We process personal data based on one or more legal bases provided by the GDPR:
bases: Art. 6(1)(b) — Contract performance: processing necessary to manage bookings, allocate contractors, process payments and issue invoices.
Art. 6(1)(a) — Consent: marketing communications (if opted in), personality test by employees, push token storage.
Art. 6(1)(c) — Legal obligation: retention of tax documents for 10 years (Romanian Accounting Law no. 82/1991), ANAF reporting.
Art. 6(1)(f) — Legitimate interest: fraud prevention, account security, anonymised statistical analysis of platform usage.
Note: the personality test generates psychometric scores that do NOT constitute special category data under Art. 9 GDPR (they do not reveal health status, political or religious affiliation).

s4.title: 4. Third-Party Processors and Recipients
s4.intro: Your data may be shared with the following authorised processors, with whom we have Data Processing Agreements (DPA):

processors.name: Stripe Inc. (USA)
processors.details: Processes and stores card data and executes financial transfers. EU-US Data Privacy Framework certified. Safeguard: Standard Contractual Clauses (SCC) adopted by the European Commission.

processors.name: Google LLC (USA)
processors.details: Google OAuth (authentication), Firebase Cloud Messaging (push notifications), Google Maps/Places (address autocomplete). Safeguard: EU-US Data Privacy Framework.

processors.name: Google Cloud Platform / Firebase (USA)
processors.details: Uploaded documents (criminal records, contracts, certificates) are securely stored in Google Cloud Storage. Safeguard: EU-US Data Privacy Framework.

processors.name: Neon Inc. (USA)
processors.details: Stores platform data in cloud databases. Safeguard: Standard Contractual Clauses. EU regions can be configured upon request.

s4.noSale: We do not sell or transfer your personal data to third parties for their own commercial purposes.

s5.title: 5. Data Retention Periods
s5.intro: We retain your data only as long as necessary:

periods.duration: For the duration of the account + 30 days after deletion (anonymisation)
2 years from the completion of the associated booking
3 years after termination of collaboration (commercial/labour law)
During collaboration; deleted with the employee account

s6.title: 6. Your Rights
s6.intro: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
s6.r1Desc: You may request a copy of all data we hold about you.
s6.r2Desc: You may correct inaccurate or incomplete data at any time via account settings or by email.
s6.r3: Right to erasure / 'right to be forgotten' (Art. 17)
s6.r3Desc: You may request deletion of your data, except where retention is required by law (e.g. invoices).
s6.r4Desc: You may receive your data in a structured, commonly used and machine-readable format.
s6.r5Desc: You may object to processing based on legitimate interest or for direct marketing purposes.
s6.r6Desc: You may request temporary limitation of processing in certain circumstances (e.g. contesting data accuracy).
s6.contact: To exercise any right, contact us at contact@go2fix.ro. You will receive a response within 30 days. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the National Supervisory Authority for Personal Data Processing (ANSPDCP) — www.dataprotection.ro.

s7.title: 7. Transfers Outside the European Union
s7.p1: Some processors (Stripe, Google, Neon) are based in the USA. Data transfers are carried out with appropriate safeguards under Art. 46 GDPR:
safeguards: Standard Contractual Clauses (SCC) adopted by the European Commission
Certification under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework
s7.p2: You may request additional information about the specific safeguards applicable to transfers by writing to contact@go2fix.ro.

s8.title: 8. Contact and Complaints
s8.p1: Data Protection Officer (DPO): contact@go2fix.ro. You will receive a response within 30 calendar days.
s8.p2: If you believe that the processing of your data violates the GDPR, you have the right to lodge a complaint with:
s8.authority: National Supervisory Authority for Personal Data Processing (ANSPDCP)
s8.authorityDetails: 28-30 G-ral. Gheorghe Magheru Blvd., Sector 1, Bucharest | www.dataprotection.ro | anspdcp@dataprotection.ro

meta.title: Privacy Policy | Go2Fix.ro
meta.description: Privacy policy and personal data protection on the Go2Fix.ro platform, in compliance with GDPR.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Go2Fix SRL respects users' right to privacy and is committed to protecting personal data in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and applicable national legislation. This policy describes the types of data collected, the purpose of processing, and your rights.

s1.title: 1. Data controller
s1.p1: The personal data controller is Go2Fix SRL, registered in Bucharest, Romania. You can contact us for any aspect related to data processing at: contact@go2fix.ro.

s2.title: 2. Data collected
s2.intro: Depending on how you use the Platform, we collect the following categories of data:
cat3Items: Card data processed by Stripe (not stored directly by us)

s3.title: 3. Purpose of processing
s3.intro: We process your data for the following purposes:
s3.scope1Desc: processing and managing cleaning service bookings
s3.scope2Desc: booking status notifications, chat with the cleaning company, support
s3.scope3Desc: processing financial transactions and issuing invoices
s3.scope4Desc: fraud prevention, identity verification, account protection
s3.scope5Desc: anonymised statistical analysis to improve the platform
s3.scope6Desc: compliance with tax requirements and other applicable regulations

s4.title: 4. Legal basis for processing
s4.intro: We process your data on the basis of:
s4.b1: Contract performance (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR) — for managing bookings and payments;
s4.b2: Consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR) — for marketing communications, if you have opted in;
s4.b3: Legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR) — for fraud prevention and platform security;
s4.b4: Legal obligation (Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR) — for tax and accounting obligations.

s5.title: 5. Your rights
s5.intro: Under GDPR, you have the following rights in relation to your data:
s5.r1Desc: You may request a copy of the data we hold about you.
s5.r2Desc: You may correct inaccurate or incomplete data at any time.
s5.r3Desc: You may request deletion of your data, subject to certain legal exceptions.
s5.r4Desc: You may receive your data in a structured format.
s5.r5Desc: You may object to processing based on legitimate interest.
s5.r6Desc: You may request restriction of processing in certain circumstances.
s5.contact: To exercise your rights, contact us at contact@go2fix.ro. You will receive a response within 30 days. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the National Supervisory Authority for Personal Data Processing (ANSPDCP).

s6.title: 6. Cookies
s6.intro: The Platform uses cookies and similar technologies to ensure correct operation of services and to analyse traffic.
s6.c1Desc: Necessary for the platform to function (authentication, session). Cannot be disabled.
s6.c2Desc: We collect anonymised usage data via Google Analytics to improve the platform.
s6.c3Desc: Store your preferences (language, settings) for a better experience.

s7.title: 7. Data retention period
s7.p1: We retain your data for as long as necessary for the purposes described above or as required by legal obligations. Account data is retained for the duration of service use. Upon account deletion, personal data is anonymised or deleted within 30 days, except for data required for tax obligations (retained for 10 years by law).

s8.title: 8. DPO contact
s8.p1: Our Data Protection Officer can be contacted at: contact@go2fix.ro. Any question, request or complaint relating to the processing of personal data can be addressed to this address.
